title: Is true empathy possible between humans and AI?
description: As artificial intelligence (AI) continues to influence all facets of our personal and professional lives, questions abound, like, "Can people have actual feelings for robots?" or "Can a chatbot comfort someone in distress?" Penn State faculty members and Rock Ethics Institute senior research associates Daryl Cameron and Alan Wagner are working hard to better understand these questions.

title: ‘Promise and peril.’ Can AI policing technology help solve crime in San Diego?
description: Detectives don’t have time to comb through massive amounts of evidence, but artificial intelligence can, said the CEO of Longeye, an AI software that helps investigators solve crimes.
content:
When Guillaume Delépine’s home was robbed, police told him there was only a 13% chance he would recover his belongings.
